prompt: Actually, let's bring back the dark mode task — put it back in the backlog.

fixture.description: Backlog with one item in 'discarded' status that previously went through several lanes. gate_from is non-zero from a prior backward move.

assertions: The item's status is updated to 'backlog'
The previous status ('discarded') is appended to lane_history
gate_from is set to the new length of lane_history (watermark reset)
Claude confirms the item has been restored to backlog
Claude does not attempt any gate rule check (backward moves are always allowed)
